column17: A GEM IN ONE OF TEMPLE'S NEWEST NEIGHBORHOODS! From the moment you arrive, this 4-bedroom, 3.5-bath, 3-car garage home delights w/its painted board & batten & stone exterior, stained wood columns & attractive iron front doors. Inside, a light-filled foyer welcomes guests into an open floor plan design where every detail feels intentional—custom cabinetry, soaring beamed ceilings & more gorgeous iron doors! The open living, dining & kitchen spaces are designed for gathering & feature a generous island w/farm sink, GE Café appliances including a 6-burner gas cooktop & double ovens, & beautiful quartz countertops. The large dining area—under a stunning drum pendant light, & spacious family room are anchored by a gas fireplace below a Samsung Art TV. An incredible butler's pantry offers plenty of storage along w/beverage fridge & 2nd sink! 2 remarkable offices elevate the work-from-home experience—one a dramatic library w/floor-to-ceiling bookshelves & rolling ladder, the other a bright, cozy retreat w/a stone accent wall & corner windows. The primary suite is a private hideaway w/custom built-ins—including a window seat, desk, & bookshelves, that opens into a luxurious double vanity bath w/walk-in shower, a windowed exercise room & an expertly organized closet that has easy laundry room access. 2 secondary bedrooms w/walk-in closets share access to a double vanity bath papered w/Rifle Paper Co. wallpaper while the 3rd bedroom is upstairs w/its own private bath & easy attic access. Outdoor living is effortless, w/upgraded folding glass doors leading to a large covered porch complete w/built-in grill & cooktop burner, ceiling fans, & tranquil wooded views. Practical luxuries abound—sprinkler system, 500-gallon buried propane tank, Generac generator, EV charger, & luxury vinyl plank flooring. In the sought-after Academy ISD, every corner of this Freyer's Creek build whispers quality & every space invites connection—this is a home where style, function, & heart meet.

column17: INTRODUCING THE EAGLE RIDGE 2026 PARADE HOME! This stunning new home is loaded with upgrades and designer touches throughout. Featuring 4 bedrooms, 3 baths, a spacious living area, study, and game room with custom built-ins, this home offers both functionality and luxury. The split master suite is a true retreat, showcasing floating vanities, quartz countertops, double walk-in closets, and elegant toe-kick lighting. The chef’s kitchen is exceptional with GE Café appliances (including refrigerator), a large quartz island, and a butler’s pantry complete with microwave and sink. The study includes built-in desk and bookshelves, while additional highlights throughout the home include interior and exterior exposed beams, stained wood ceilings, upgraded plumbing and electrical fixtures, smart switches for exterior lighting, a convenient Roomba nook, gas log fireplace, ceramic accent walls in baths, and interior stone accents. Step outside to a spacious covered back porch with a fully equipped outdoor kitchen—perfect for entertaining. The home also features a 3-car garage, full sod and sprinkler system, mature trees, and a privacy fence. A true showcase home you don’t want to miss!

column17: SPRING SALE!  Stunning new home by Eagle Ridge Builders in prestigious Fryer’s Bend! This impressive plan offers 3 bedrooms in a split arrangement, 3.5 baths, an office, flex room, and an extra upstairs room with a full bath that could be a 4th bedroom or game room. The open living area and kitchen feature a beamed ceiling and fireplace, creating a warm and inviting space for everyone to gather. The kitchen is beautifully equipped with a large island, farm sink, double ovens, microwave, GE Profile 5-burner gas cooktop, and a butler’s pantry with sink. The split master suite includes a tray ceiling, luxurious bath with separate tub and shower, and a spacious walk-in closet that connects directly to the utility room. Exterior highlights include a covered front porch, large covered back patio with fireplace and beadboard ceiling, and a 3-car garage. The yard is fully landscaped with sod, flower beds, sprinkler system, mature trees, and a fenced backyard. Located in a gated subdivision with a private park and walking trail along the creek—this one truly has it all! LIMITED SPECIAL OFFER! Builder will give $20,000 toward buyer’s closing costs with an accepted contract and close before April 15th.

column17: SPRING SALE!  Another stunning new home by Eagle Ridge Builders in the prestigious gated community of Fryer’s Bend. This impressive plan offers 4 bedrooms, 3 baths, a spacious living room, and a game room—perfect for entertaining. The living area has a vaulted ceiling with center beam and a cozy fireplace that opens to the kitchen and dining areas. The kitchen is a chef’s dream with an island, farm sink, GE Café 6-burner range, pot filler, microwave, and a butler’s pantry with sink, a 2nd microwave, and additional storage. The split master suite features a luxurious bath with separate tub and shower, and a large walk-in closet that connects to the utility room with sink, storage, and convenient mud room. Energy-efficient features include foamed insulation, double-insulated vinyl windows, and more. Enjoy outdoor living on the large covered back patio with fireplace, beadboard ceiling, and built-in cooking area. The exterior showcases stone, brick, and cement siding for low-maintenance beauty. Fryer’s Bend offers a private park and walking trail along the creek—truly an AMAZING HOME! LIMITED SPECIAL OFFER! Builder will give $20,000 toward buyer’s closing costs with an accepted contract and close before April 15th.

column17: YAHOO! Another stunning new home by Eagle Ridge Builders in the prestigious Fryer’s Bend subdivision! This thoughtfully designed plan offers 3 spacious bedrooms, 3 full baths, a 2nd living area, and a dedicated office, perfect for today’s lifestyle. The large living room features an elevated ceiling, creating an open and inviting space for gatherings.  The chef’s kitchen is a true highlight with its quartz island, farm sink, KitchenAid appliances with 6 burner gas range plus a B/I oven, and a generous walk-in pantry. The master suite is a private retreat with a split arrangement, double sinks, freestanding tub, walk-in shower, and an oversized walk-in closet. A second bedroom includes its own private bath, offering comfort for guests or family. Practical touches abound, including a utility room with cabinets, counter space, and a sink. Flooring throughout combines tile, carpet, and modern SPC flooring—a durable, wood-look option with the ease of vinyl.  Enjoy outdoor living on the large back porch with a cozy fireplace and bead-board ceiling, overlooking a landscaped lot with mature trees, full sod, sprinkler system, and privacy fence. Additional features include a 3-car garage and a soft contemporary front elevation. Located in a gated subdivision with a private park area by the creek, this home is truly a must-see!

column17: YOU’VE GOT TO SEE THIS ONE! Presenting the jaw-dropping award winning 2025 Parade of Homes by Eagle Ridge Builders, nestled in one of Temple's newest gated subdivisions, Fryer’s Bend. This spectacular home is loaded with luxurious features, perfect for modern living. With a great floor plan offers 4 bedrooms, 3 baths, a family room, game room, and 2 dining areas, there's space for everyone to enjoy. The kitchen is a chef's dream, featuring GE Café appliances, custom cabinets, pendant lights, a gas range, farm sink, big island with breakfast bar, and plenty of counter space. The butler's pantry offers plenty of storage, along with a microwave and farm sink, perfect for hosting gatherings with ease. Step into the master suite, a true oasis with its split arrangement, walk-in closet with tons of storage. Indulge in your walk-in shower or designer tub, and undermount sinks, creating the ultimate retreat. Entertain in style on the huge covered back porch, complete with bead board ceilings, ceiling fan, a fireplace, outdoor cooking area with grill/drink fridge/sink overlooking a tree covered fully fenced backyard. Parade home features abound, including custom white oak cabinets, 3cm engineered and natural stone countertops, luxury vinyl floors, upgraded plumbing and electrical fixtures, ”smart house” with Control4 automatic on/off lighting, sound system by Custom Integrators with speakers in the game room/living room/back porch, security system and so much more. Exterior is brick/stone/cement siding with an Owens Corning Duration Series shingle roof. Three car attached garage with Liftmaster myQ door openers, exposed aggregate finish on the driveway/side walk/back porch, beautifully landscaped yard with full sprinkler system. Fryer’s Bend is a gated subdivision with lots of beautiful trees, a creek and a walking trail around the private park. Check it out. You won’t be disappointed.
